'''竏營-dh-l-f''' ('''kazadhlefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:orienate|orienate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:orienate|orienate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-dh-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhlefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhlefoko|thizadhlefoko]] || [[word:jizadhlefoko|jizadhlefoko]] || [[word:shizadhlefoko|shizadhlefoko]] || [[word:kizadhlefoko|kizadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhlefoko|thuthuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:jujuzadhlefoko|jujuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:shushuzadhlefoko|shushuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:kukuzadhlefoko|kukuzadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadhlefoko|thuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:juzadhlefoko|juzadhlefoko]] || [[word:shuzadhlefoko|shuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:kuzadhlefoko|kuzadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadhlefoko|thuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:juzadhlefoko|juzadhlefoko]] || [[word:shuzadhlefoko|shuzadhlefoko]] || [[word:kuzadhlefoko|kuzadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadhlefoko|thezadhlefoko]] || [[word:jezadhlefoko|jezadhlefoko]] || [[word:shezadhlefoko|shezadhlefoko]] || [[word:kezadhlefoko|kezadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozadhlefoko|thothozadhlefoko]] || [[word:jojozadhlefoko|jojozadhlefoko]] || [[word:shoshozadhlefoko|shoshozadhlefoko]] || [[word:kokozadhlefoko|kokozadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadhlefoko|thozadhlefoko]] || [[word:jozadhlefoko|jozadhlefoko]] || [[word:shozadhlefoko|shozadhlefoko]] || [[word:kozadhlefoko|kozadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhlefoko|thozadhlefoko]] || [[word:jozadhlefoko|jozadhlefoko]] || [[word:shozadhlefoko|shozadhlefoko]] || [[word:kozadhlefoko|kozadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzadhlefoko|thﾃｦzadhlefoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzadhlefoko|jﾃｦzadhlefoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzadhlefoko|shﾃｦzadhlefoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzadhlefoko|kﾃｦzadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadhlefoko|thathazadhlefoko]] || [[word:jajazadhlefoko|jajazadhlefoko]] || [[word:shashazadhlefoko|shashazadhlefoko]] || [[word:kakazadhlefoko|kakazadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadhlefoko|thazadhlefoko]] || [[word:jazadhlefoko|jazadhlefoko]] || [[word:shazadhlefoko|shazadhlefoko]] || [[word:kazadhlefoko|kazadhlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhlefoko|thazadhlefoko]] || [[word:jazadhlefoko|jazadhlefoko]] || [[word:shazadhlefoko|shazadhlefoko]] || [[word:kazadhlefoko|kazadhlefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazadhlefithi|shazadhlefithi]] || [[word:shazadhlefiji|shazadhlefiji]] || [[word:shazadhlefishi|shazadhlefishi]] || [[word:shazadhlefiki|shazadhlefiki]]
